title: nuclei
html:
nuclei

Fast scanner using community-maintained YAML templates. Good for quick vuln checks after initial recon surfaces web services.

Basic Scanning

# Auto-detect technology and scan with relevant templates
nuclei -u http://target -as

# Scan single URL
nuclei -u http://target

# Scan from URL list
nuclei -l urls.txt

# Scan with automatic browser-based crawling
nuclei -u http://target -headless

Template Selection

# Specific template category
nuclei -u http://target -t cves/
nuclei -u http://target -t exposures/
nuclei -u http://target -t misconfigurations/
nuclei -u http://target -t default-logins/
nuclei -u http://target -t vulnerabilities/
nuclei -u http://target -t technologies/

# Specific template
nuclei -u http://target -t cves/2021/CVE-2021-44228.yaml

# Multiple categories
nuclei -u http://target -t cves/ -t exposures/ -t misconfigurations/

# Exclude templates
nuclei -u http://target -exclude-templates dos/

# Custom template directory
nuclei -u http://target -t /path/to/custom-templates/

Severity Filtering

# Critical and high only
nuclei -u http://target -severity critical,high

# Exclude info-level noise
nuclei -u http://target -exclude-severity info

# Single severity
nuclei -u http://target -severity critical

Tag Filtering

# By technology tag
nuclei -u http://target -tags apache
nuclei -u http://target -tags wordpress
nuclei -u http://target -tags joomla
nuclei -u http://target -tags rce

# Exclude tags
nuclei -u http://target -exclude-tags dos,fuzz

# Common useful tags
# rce, lfi, xss, sqli, ssrf, redirect, exposure, token, default-login, cve

Rate Limiting & Performance

# Rate limit (requests per second)
nuclei -u http://target -rl 50

# Concurrent templates
nuclei -u http://target -c 25

# Bulk size (hosts processed in parallel)
nuclei -u http://target -bs 50

# Timeout per request (seconds)
nuclei -u http://target -timeout 10

# Retries
nuclei -u http://target -retries 3

Output

# Save to file
nuclei -u http://target -o results.txt

# JSON output
nuclei -u http://target -jsonl -o results.json

# Markdown report
nuclei -u http://target -me report/

# Silent (only results)
nuclei -u http://target -silent

Authentication & Headers

# Custom headers
nuclei -u http://target -H "Authorization: Bearer TOKEN"
nuclei -u http://target -H "Cookie: session=abc123"

# Proxy
nuclei -u http://target -proxy http://127.0.0.1:8080

Template Management

# Update templates
nuclei -update-templates

# List templates
nuclei -tl

# Template stats
nuclei -stats

HTB Common Combos

# Quick vuln check after nmap finds web
nuclei -u http://target -severity critical,high,medium -o nuclei_results.txt

# Full auto-scan (technology detection + relevant templates)
nuclei -u http://target -as -severity critical,high

# Scan multiple discovered endpoints
cat urls.txt | nuclei -severity critical,high -o findings.txt

# Check for default creds
nuclei -u http://target -t default-logins/ -o defaults.txt

# Check exposed files and configs
nuclei -u http://target -t exposures/ -severity medium,high,critical

# CVE-specific check
nuclei -u http://target -tags cve -severity critical

Workflow with Other Tools

# Pipe from httpx (probe alive hosts first)
cat subdomains.txt | httpx -silent | nuclei -severity critical,high

# After ffuf finds endpoints
cat ffuf_results.json | jq -r '.results[].url' | nuclei
